# init(values:)

**Initializer**

Creates a [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDDeviceClient/ProvideElementUpdate].

## Declaration

```swift
init(values: [HIDElement.Value])
```

## Parameters

- **values**: The values used to update the elements.
